name: Ministry of Housing and Municipal Affairs

goals.short_name: Tenants and landlords have fair, accessible tenancy processes

main_services.name: Start, manage and end a residential tenancy
Live in and manage strata housing

goals.short_name: Renters, homeowners and people in housing need can find and afford a place to live

main_services.name: Find subsidized or affordable rental housing
Get help if you're experiencing homelessness

goals.short_name: Homes are built to code and short-term rentals support B.C.'s housing supply

main_services.name: Build, renovate or buy a home to code
Register and operate a short-term rental

goals.short_name: Local governments have the funding, tools and democratic processes to serve their communities

main_services.name: Take part in local government elections
Understand local government powers and bylaws

acts.summary: Governs most residential tenancies in B.C. and establishes the Residential Tenancy Branch's dispute resolution process. Referenced directly (bclaws document id statreg/02078_01) from the Residential Tenancy Branch's own tenancy dispute resolution page.

sections.title: Tenancy agreements and starting a tenancy
sections.description: Sets out the requirements for tenancy agreements, deposits, and the rights and responsibilities of tenants and landlords at the start of a tenancy.

services.name: Learn your rights when starting a tenancy
services.ms_name: Start, manage and end a residential tenancy

sections.title: Dispute resolution and arbitration
sections.description: Establishes the direct request, facilitation, participatory hearing and expedited hearing processes the Residential Tenancy Branch uses to resolve disputes.

services.name: Resolve a tenancy dispute with your landlord or tenant
services.ms_name: Start, manage and end a residential tenancy

sections.title: Ending a tenancy and evictions
sections.description: Sets out the lawful ways a tenancy can end, including tenant notice, landlord eviction notices, mutual agreement and special circumstances.

services.name: End a tenancy or respond to an eviction notice
services.ms_name: Start, manage and end a residential tenancy

sections.title: Rent and rent increases
sections.description: Sets the rules for paying rent and the maximum allowable annual rent increase.

services.name: Check the rules on rent and rent increases
services.ms_name: Start, manage and end a residential tenancy

acts.summary: Governs tenancies in manufactured home parks in parallel with the Residential Tenancy Act. Referenced directly (bclaws document id statreg/02077_01) alongside the RTA on the Residential Tenancy Branch's dispute resolution page as one of the two acts a dispute must fall under.

sections.title: Dispute resolution
sections.description: Extends the Residential Tenancy Branch's dispute resolution processes to manufactured home park tenancies.

services.name: Resolve a tenancy dispute with your landlord or tenant
services.ms_name: Start, manage and end a residential tenancy

acts.summary: Governs strata corporations in B.C., including bylaws and rules, dispute resolution, and the process to terminate (wind up) a strata corporation. Named directly on the Province's strata legislation and changes page.

sections.title: Bylaws and rules
sections.description: Authorizes strata corporations to set bylaws and rules governing the use of strata lots and common property.

services.name: Understand your strata's bylaws and rules
services.ms_name: Live in and manage strata housing

sections.title: Dispute resolution
sections.description: Sets out how strata disputes can be resolved within the strata corporation, through the Civil Resolution Tribunal, in court, or by arbitration.

services.name: Resolve a strata property dispute
services.ms_name: Live in and manage strata housing

sections.title: Termination of a strata corporation
sections.description: Sets out the process for a strata corporation to wind up and cancel its strata plan with an 80% vote of all owners.

services.name: Wind up a strata corporation
services.ms_name: Live in and manage strata housing

acts.summary: Establishes the provincial short-term rental registry, the principal residence requirement, and stronger local government enforcement tools. Confirmed via the Province's short-term rental legislation page and registration page, and Bill 35 (2023).

sections.title: Provincial registration
sections.description: Requires short-term rental hosts, platforms and strata hotel platforms operating in B.C. to register annually with the Province.

services.name: Register your short-term rental as a host
services.ms_name: Register and operate a short-term rental

sections.title: Principal residence requirement
sections.description: Limits short-term rentals in many communities to a host's principal residence plus one secondary suite or accessory dwelling unit.

services.name: Check if the principal residence requirement applies to your rental
services.ms_name: Register and operate a short-term rental

sections.title: Compliance and enforcement
sections.description: Establishes the provincial Compliance and Enforcement Unit and increased fines local governments can set for short-term rental bylaw offences.

services.name: Report a short-term rental compliance concern
services.ms_name: Register and operate a short-term rental

acts.summary: Establishes the provincial building code framework and streamlines local government building regulation across B.C. Named directly on the Province's construction standards page.

sections.title: Provincial building code
sections.description: Establishes the BC Building, Plumbing and Fire codes that apply to construction, renovation and alteration of buildings.

services.name: Check building code requirements for your project
services.ms_name: Build, renovate or buy a home to code

sections.title: Building permits and local government authority
sections.description: Sets the provincial framework local governments use to require and issue building permits.

services.name: Get a permit before you build or renovate
services.ms_name: Build, renovate or buy a home to code

acts.summary: Requires residential builders to be licensed and new homes to carry third-party warranty insurance. Confirmed via a direct bclaws link (document id freeside/00_98031_01) on BC Housing's builder licensing page.

sections.title: Residential builder licensing
sections.description: Requires general contractors, developers and building envelope renovators to hold a residential builder licence before starting construction.

services.name: Become a licensed residential builder
services.ms_name: Build, renovate or buy a home to code

sections.title: New home warranty registration
sections.description: Requires new homes built by licensed residential builders to be registered for third-party home warranty insurance.

services.name: Register a new home for warranty protection
services.ms_name: Build, renovate or buy a home to code

acts.summary: Authorizes provincial grants and transfers to local governments. Confirmed via a direct bclaws link (document id statreg/96275_01) on the Province's local government grants and transfers page.

sections.title: Grants to local governments
sections.description: Authorizes conditional and unconditional grants to municipalities and regional districts, including infrastructure and small community grants.

services.name: Apply for local government infrastructure or community grant funding
services.ms_name: Access local government funding programs

acts.summary: The core legislative framework for regional districts and local government elections and bylaw powers in B.C. Confirmed via a direct bclaws link (document id lc/statreg/r15001_00) on the Province's general local elections page.

sections.title: Nomination and eligibility for local office
sections.description: Sets residency and nomination requirements for candidates in general local elections.

services.name: Run for local government office
services.ms_name: Take part in local government elections

sections.title: Voter eligibility and voting
sections.description: Sets out who is eligible to vote in general local elections and how voting opportunities are provided.

services.name: Vote in a local government election
services.ms_name: Take part in local government elections

sections.title: Regional district bylaw-making authority
sections.description: Authorizes regional district boards to make bylaws under the powers and services set out in the Act.

services.name: Look up your local government's bylaws
services.ms_name: Understand local government powers and bylaws

acts.summary: The core legislative framework for municipal governance and bylaw-making powers in B.C. Confirmed via a direct bclaws link (document id statreg/03026_00) on the Province's short-term rental legislation page.

sections.title: Municipal bylaw-making authority
sections.description: Grants municipal councils broad authority to make bylaws, including for business licensing and zoning.

services.name: Look up your local government's bylaws
services.ms_name: Understand local government powers and bylaws

acts.summary: Governs campaign financing and election advertising rules for candidates and elector organizations in general local elections. Confirmed via a direct bclaws link (document id statreg/14018) on the Province's general local elections page.

sections.title: Campaign financing rules for candidates
sections.description: Sets campaign financing and election advertising rules that candidates and their financial agents must follow.

services.name: Run for local government office
services.ms_name: Take part in local government elections
